description: A citizen wants to check if they are registered to vote at their current address.

nodes.task_description: Gather the citizen's name, address, and date of birth.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects the information needed to perform the search.

nodes.task_description: Search the statewide voter registration database.
Inform the citizen of their registration status and polling place location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the citizen is registered and provides their polling location.
